note: Layout Builder Save And Edit is a single hook_form_alter with no config, routes, permissions, or plugins. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) — they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read the .module source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with core Layout Builder, what does the layout_builder_save_and_edit module add and how does it differ from the stock save button?
evals.expected_output: It adds a second action button 'Save and edit layout' to Layout Builder forms that saves the layout and redirects back to the same layout-editing page, instead of the stock 'Save layout' which saves and exits Layout Builder.

evals.prompt: How do I configure layout_builder_save_and_edit and what settings does it expose?
evals.expected_output: There is nothing to configure. The module has no configuration UI, no routes, no permissions, and no settings — it is a single hook_form_alter that applies site-wide as soon as you enable it with drush en.

evals.prompt: Which forms does layout_builder_save_and_edit add its button to?
evals.expected_output: The Layout Builder defaults form (DefaultsEntityForm), the Layout Builder overrides form (OverridesEntityForm), and content entity add/edit forms (ContentEntityFormInterface) that have a layout_builder__layout override field — but not delete forms.

evals.prompt: What permission controls whether the Save and edit layout button appears on a content entity edit form, and does this module define it?
evals.expected_output: The core Layout Builder dynamic permission 'configure editable {bundle} {entity_type} layout overrides' (e.g. 'configure editable article node layout overrides'). This module does not define any permissions of its own.

evals.prompt: After clicking Save and edit layout on a node edit form, where does layout_builder_save_and_edit send the user, and how does it stop a destination parameter from overriding that?
evals.expected_output: It redirects to the entity's Layout Builder overrides view route (layout_builder.overrides.{entity_type}.view) and removes any 'destination' query parameter before calling setRedirectUrl so the redirect is not overridden.

evals.prompt: What does layout_builder_save_and_edit depend on to work?
evals.expected_output: It depends on core Layout Builder (drupal:layout_builder); it requires Drupal core ^10 || ^11 and has no other dependencies or external libraries.
